response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and a track record of building scalable platforms and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of experimentation systems, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or AI-driven growth platforms at enterprise scale — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to build and lead open-source platforms (GISCollective) and developer tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Strong cross-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Python, DLang, C++, and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, guardrails, or feature flighting systems
Lack of demonstrated experience with telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis for growth decisions
Minimal mention of cross-team stakeholder alignment or AI tooling to accelerate engineering velocity
